name: Funfetti Cookies
keywords: best of 50 years of bake off
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2 In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, oil, and eggs. Stir until thoroughly moistened.
3 Shape the dough into 1-inch balls and place them about 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
4 Using the bottom of a glass dipped in flour, flatten each ball to about 1/4 inch thick.
5 Bake for 6-8 minutes or until the edges are golden brown. Cool for 1 minute before removing from the cookie sheets.
6 Spread frosting over warm cookies.
7 Immediately sprinkle each cookie with candy bits from the frosting.
8 Let the frosting set before storing in a tightly covered container.
